'''Msst''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Brakiss]]. It was a small planet in the Msst system, which had an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stronghold. The Empire had theoretically abandoned it after the [[Invasion of Bakura]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] came to Msst in search of Brakiss, where, shortly after landing, he was attacked by a group of [[mistmaker]]s.

{{Planet-stub}}
